name: @iracing-race-engineer/api
description: Fastify backend API for iRacing race engineer

scripts.ai:status: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags | jq '.models[].name' || echo '❌ Ollama not running or jq not installed'
scripts.ai:setup: echo '🤖 Setting up AI Race Engineer...' && ollama pull llama3.1:8b
scripts.ai:setup-lite: echo '🤖 Setting up AI Race Engineer (lite)...' && ollama pull phi3:mini
scripts.ai:serve: echo '🤖 Starting Ollama server...' && ollama serve
